languages.text: "Последнее пожелание, {name}". {n}В последние мгновения перед смертью слова Эоганна вдруг обретают прежние силу и звучность.{/n} "Позаботьтесь о Нунциусе".
"A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."
languages.original_text: "Последнее пожелание, {name}". {n}В последние мгновения перед смертью слова Эоганна вдруг обретают прежние силу и звучность.{/n} "Позаботьтесь о Нунциусе".

traits.locale_text: "A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."
"A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."

"A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."

languages.text: "Eine letzte Bitte, {name}." {n}In den Sekunden vor seinem Tod hat Eogunns Stimme plötzlich wieder ihre einstige Stärke und Resonanz.{/n} "Kümmert Euch um Nuncius."
languages.original_text: "A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: "Eine letzte Bitte, {name}." {n}In den Sekunden vor seinem Tod hat Eogunns Stimme plötzlich wieder ihre einstige Stärke und Resonanz.{/n} "Kümmert Euch um Nuncius."

languages.text: « J'ai une dernière chose à vous demander, {name}. »{n}Tandis que ses derniers instants approchent, la voix d'Eogunn se fait plus forte et résonne comme autrefois.{/n} « Je vous en prie, prenez soin de Nuncius. »
languages.original_text: "A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai une dernière chose à vous demander, {name}. »{n}Tandis que ses derniers instants approchent, la voix d'Eogunn se fait plus forte et résonne comme autrefois.{/n} « Je vous en prie, prenez soin de Nuncius. »

languages.text: «Tengo una última petición, {name}». {n}En sus últimos momentos, la voz de Eogunn recupera su fuerza y sonoridad.{/n} «Cuide de Nuncius».
languages.original_text: "A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: «Tengo una última petición, {name}». {n}En sus últimos momentos, la voz de Eogunn recupera su fuerza y sonoridad.{/n} «Cuide de Nuncius».

languages.text: "Son bir isteğim olacak." {n}Eogunn'un sesi, ölmeden hemen önce aniden eski gücünü ve yankısını geri kazanıyor.{/n} "Nuncius'a iyi bakın."
languages.original_text: "A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: "Son bir isteğim olacak." {n}Eogunn'un sesi, ölmeden hemen önce aniden eski gücünü ve yankısını geri kazanıyor.{/n} "Nuncius'a iyi bakın."

languages.text: “最后一个请求，{name}。”{n}在临死前的一刻，伊奥贡的声音忽然恢复了往日的力度与洪亮。{/n}“照顾好努恩修斯。”
languages.original_text: "A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: “最后一个请求，{name}。”{n}在临死前的一刻，伊奥贡的声音忽然恢复了往日的力度与洪亮。{/n}“照顾好努恩修斯。”

languages.text: 「最後の願いです、{name}」{n}死を前にしたその瞬間、エオガンの声は突如、かつての力強さと響きを取り戻す。{/n}「ヌンキウスを、よろしく頼みます」
languages.original_text: "A final request, {name}." {n}In the moments before death, Eogunn's voice suddenly regains its former strength and resonance.{/n} "Take care of Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: 「最後の願いです、{name}」{n}死を前にしたその瞬間、エオガンの声は突如、かつての力強さと響きを取り戻す。{/n}「ヌンキウスを、よろしく頼みます」
